title: No Player Name
body:
# PlayerName Toggle

A lightweight Minecraft plugin that allows players to toggle the visibility of in‑game player names with a simple command. Perfect for roleplay servers, cinematic recordings.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/375SDr534M8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features
- **Toggle player names easily**
  - `/playername on` → Show player names
  - `/playername off` → Hide player names
- **Persistent settings**
  - Your choice is saved automatically.
  - If player names were disabled before a server restart, they will remain disabled after the server starts back up again.

## Installation
1. Download the plugin `.jar` file.
2. Place it into your server’s `plugins` folder.
3. Restart the server.
4. Use `/playername on/off` to control name display.
